title: Caravaggio, il pittore maledetto
writer: Goffredo Alessandrini, Riccardo Freda, Gherardo Gherardi
actors: Amedeo Nazzari, Clara Calamai, Lamberto Picasso
plot: One of 8 films starring the popular Nazzari released in 1941. A painter's life is turned into a dashing romantic adventure.After killing a man,the artist escapes to Malta where he is knighted, but he cannot resist sneaking back in...
